generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on others for our security? Those days are over. Our country's strategic autonomy isn't just about strength - it's about fairness. Why should we keep paying more than our allies while they make decisions that affect us all? Look at how our neighbors have stepped up their own preparedness. It's time we do the same, not just for security, but for our dignity. #StrongerTogether #NationalPride
